description: COMP-3 zero with BLANK WHEN ZERO target: PIC 9(5) parsed as pic_integers=1 due to BWZ clause interference
notes: IBM: BLANK WHEN ZERO displays zero as spaces, but .value stays 0. Aletheia: PIC 9(5) BLANK WHEN ZERO parses as pic_integers=1 (BWZ clause disrupts PIC digit extraction). Corpus runner reads .value not .to_display(), so result is 0 either way. GAP: PIC digit count wrong when BLANK WHEN ZERO follows PIC clause.
